name: Premier Golf
address: 1540 E Fairview Ave Suite 104, Meridian, ID 83642
about: Premier Golf is an exclusive membership indoor golf simulator experience that utilizes Trackman technology, the same system used by the PGA Tour. The facility combines dual radar with high-end optics to track the full trajectory of any shot, from short putts to 400-yard drives, and provides advanced analytics in a private, professional setting. It offers an unmatched experience with country club standards but the feel of a home environment, available for use 24/7 by members.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to Trackman technology used by PGA Tour professionals
Advanced analytics with 26+ data points to improve game
24/7 access to a private, professional facility

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food or beverage service mentioned
No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual radar with high-end optics technology

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members must bring their own clubs for use with the Trackman simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No on-site food or beverage service is mentioned, and BYOB policy is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to complete 18 virtual holes is not specified, but members book time slots for practice or play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The facility appears to cater to serious golfers and adults, with no specific mention of junior programs or family-friendly features.
